steps: File Form 5001 with French tax authorities to reclaim EUR 3,744 excess withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Submit evidence to BNP Paribas Securities showing FR-NO treaty 15% rate applies vs. 13.5% withheld
Include Norwegian tax residency certificate and account 901234567 dividend statement as supporting documentation

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
